title: Fundamental Principles of Counting Decision Flowchart
description: A flowchart that helps determine which fundamental counting principle to apply based on the nature of the selection problem: whether selections are made with/without replacement and if order matters.
relationships: Start leads to 'Does Order Matter?' decision
'Yes' from Order leads to 'With or Without Replacement?' decision
'No' from Order leads to Combination Formula
'Yes' from Replacement leads to Multiplication Principle
'No' from Replacement leads to Permutation Formula
All formulas lead to End node
